raise_justifications.backend/routers/users.py: GET /v1/users/subscription serializes the new mobile plus/max plans as `unlimited` for clients whose plan enum predates them, so day-one buyers read as paid instead of Free (mirrors the existing operator remap); real limits/grandfather are computed from the true plan first.
raise_justifications.backend/utils/other/storage.py: delete_app_logo now requires an exact app-logo bucket prefix (startswith) so a foreign URL embedding the prefix later cannot delete an unrelated object on this deletion path (David review on #9873).
raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/AuthServic: Apple first-auth name capture signals observers (authNameDidUpdate) and persists the name to Firebase so it survives reinstalls.
